title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - dialog
scenario: Account delete dialog appears and matches Figma design when tapping delete icon in General > Account tab in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to General settings.
5. Locate and tap the delete icon (trash icon) on the Account screen.
6. Observe the delete confirmation dialog that appears.
expected: The Account delete dialog is displayed and matches the Figma design specifications (correct layout, text, button labels, colors, and spacing).
